calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: KAMRAN AREDEBILCHIL IN PRO PER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ORA PROCHOVNICK FOR DEFENDANT CLAYTON OSMAN

SETTLMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE AND AGREE THAT DEFENDANT WILL VACATE PREMISES AT 629 POST #202 BY 7/19/05. PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL RENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE A NEUTRAL REFERENCE. DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. IF DEFENDANT VACATES PER THIS AGREEMENT, PLAINITFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY 7/15/05, PLAINTIFF WILL OBTAIN A JUDGMENT, BY EXPARTE APPLICATION WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, FOR POSSESSION AND FOR RENT AND PER DIEM DAMAGES.
BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS.
TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.

JUDGE PRO TEM:PETER HADIARIS ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:BELDON YEE(218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
